description_long: This sculpture is a realistic bust of a man, featuring detailed facial features, short textured hair, and a collared shirt. The figure wears glasses, which are finely modeled and rest on the nose and ears. The bust is mounted on a round, solid base, giving it stability and a formal presentation. The surface has a dark, metallic sheen, suggesting it is cast in bronze or a similar metal, with subtle highlights and shadows accentuating the contours. The back of the head and shoulders are smoothly finished, with the hair texture continuing around the crown. The overall craftsmanship is high, with attention to anatomical accuracy and lifelike expression.
description: A dark metallic bust of a man with glasses, collared shirt, and detailed hair, mounted on a round base. The sculpture is highly realistic and finely crafted.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the man's face, glasses, and upper torso with collared shirt.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile, ear, and the side of the glasses.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, hair texture, and shoulders.
description_view_3: Right rear angled view showing the back of the head and partial profile.
attribute_location_context: No visible environmental context; background is plain and featureless.
